info.title: Cockpit Supervisor API
info.description: Authenticated loopback API for Cockpit 2.0 discovery, workspaces, typed operations, case and suite runs, durable events, immutable artifacts, and aggregate reports.

port.description: Ephemeral port published in daemon discovery.

get.summary: Read Supervisor identity and protocol version
Discover negotiated features, operations, and resources

delete.summary: Drain or retire an allowed root

get.summary: List Supervisor and root operation descriptors

post.summary: Execute a typed Supervisor or root operation
Register a checkout under an allowed root
Explicitly bind a moved checkout path

get.summary: List indexed case, suite, and project documents

post.summary: Compile and validate an inline test document
Submit one inline or indexed case or suite

get.summary: Resume and stream durable run events
get.description: Uses strictly increasing sequence ids. Last-Event-ID and afterSequence resume after the named event; a retained-history gap returns 409 with explicit boundary details.

200.description: SSE stream. Each data field is one RunEvent JSON value.

get.summary: Read the finalized canonical suite report
Read cases executed by a case or suite run

200.description: Artifact bytes after ownership and SHA-256 verification.

bearerAuth.description: Read from the current-user daemon discovery file. Tokens are never accepted in URLs.

ApiVersion.name: Cockpit-API-Version
ApiVersion.description: Requested API major and maximum supported minor.

Conflict.description: Ownership, state, idempotency, or replay conflict.

primary.message: Ownership, state, idempotency, or replay conflict.

Unprocessable.description: Typed request was admitted but execution failed.

primary.message: Typed request was admitted but execution failed.

UpgradeRequired.description: API major or required feature is unavailable.

primary.message: API major or required feature is unavailable.

ResourceBusy.description: A required exclusive resource is unavailable.

primary.message: A required exclusive resource is unavailable.

Unavailable.description: Supervisor, worker, provider, or environment unavailable.

primary.message: Supervisor, worker, provider, or environment unavailable.
